message:
feat(polyfills): add TLS 1.3, WebCrypto, Transform streams, X509Certificate

Phase 6 implementation of native polyfill gaps:

- Add native TLS 1.3 with X25519 key exchange and AES-GCM ciphers
- Wire Zig TLS to JavaScript tls.connect() for secure connections
- Update https module to use native TLS sockets
- Convert Hash/Hmac/Cipher/Decipher/Sign/Verify to Transform streams
- Add WebCrypto subtle API (encrypt, decrypt, sign, verify, etc.)
- Add X509Certificate class with ASN.1 DER parsing
- Add randomFill/randomFillSync functions
- Fix zlib streams to maintain compression state across chunks
